VLM Quick Reference Guide
How To Export Room Data Sheets
Venue Logistics — Room Data Sheet Management  |  FIFA World Cup 2026™
Room Data Sheets (RDS) are the official control document used to manage the hand-over and hand-back of assets between the Venue Logistics Team and the Functional Areas operating within your venue. Because asset movements within the venue are not recorded in SM2ARTA — meaning all items will appear together in the venue inventory view rather than by individual space — the RDS is how you maintain accurate, traceable records of exactly what is allocated to each space, and in what condition.
What does each RDS cover?
  • The Functional Area name and code
  • The logical space name and code
  • All nomenclature codes (SKUs) and descriptions
  • The quantities and units of measurement
  • The condition of each asset at the time of hand-over
  • Consumable items are not included in the RDS, as they are not expected to be returned
🤝
The hand-over process requires both the Venue Logistics Manager and the Functional Area representative to physically verify all items listed in the RDS, document any pre-existing damage with photos, and sign and date the document to confirm completion. Any discrepancies or damages must be recorded directly in the RDS, and where damaged items cannot be used, a Damage Report must be completed. Once signed, one copy stays with the Functional Area and one remains with the VLM.
!
Please note that this procedure applies only to venues with a Venue Logistics presence. At venues without Venue Logistics presence, delivery documents serve as the primary hand-over and hand-back records.
✓
Generating and maintaining up-to-date RDS for every space in your venue is one of your most important responsibilities as a VLM — it is your paper trail and your protection in the event of any disputes over asset conditions or quantities.

Step-by-Step Instructions

SM2ARTA Walkthrough
1
Navigate to https://fwc26.smmarta.com/
2
Click “Material Planning”
3
Click “FWC26”

Step-by-Step Instructions

Export & Review
4
Click your venue
5
Search for the related space and click the download icon to export the “Room Data Sheet”
6
Export of the Room Data Sheet
